biological_replicate: The experiments were conducted on the BALB/c strain of mice.
technical_replicate: Two independent analyses of the ES samples were conducted.
experimental_design: identify and compare the excretory-secretory molecules from single-sex and mixed cultures.
factor_value: the composition of ES of male and female L4 stage nematodes.
number_of_fractions: The first 24 h collection of ES was discarded; medium was supplied and harvested for the next 72 h.
number_of_technical_replicates: Two independent analyses of the ES samples were conducted.
